summary: Excellent soundboard recording captures an energetic, awesome set from the September 18, 1982 show.
review: The reviewer praises the audio as excellent, indicating a clear, high‑fidelity soundboard source. The performance is described as an "awesome set" with lots of good energy, suggesting a very strong musical showing overall.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights both superb recording quality and an energetic performance, leading to a near‑perfect rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear mix with strong instrument separation; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout; the set is regarded as consistently awesome and engaging.
